case_title: WILFREDO NADONZA VS. EUROMOTORS,INC. DBA MERCEDES BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
